commands.summary: TypeScript renderer type-checks and the browser bundle builds with the simplified first-run form, Field hint widened to ReactNode, and the ExtLink helper.
20 of 20 renderer interaction tests pass, including first-run onboarding and update-connection; moving the hint outside the <label> keeps getByLabelText('Account SID'/'Local port') working.

environment.process_note: First-run setup now asks only for the three Twilio values with where-to-find hints and signup/Console links; Public webhook URL, Local host, and Local port move into a collapsed Advanced section as automatic/optional. Full auto-provisioning of the public tunnel (so inbound works with zero user webhook setup) is tracked as follow-on work.
